etymology.description: Depicts a crack in an oracle bone
etymology.interpretation: The character 卜 (bǔ, 'divination') directly depicts a crack being used in oracle bones to divine future events. This literal representation naturally extends to the concept of divination.

examples.chinese: 在古代(在古代)，人们常用龟甲进行卜卦(人們常用龜甲進行卜卦)。
examples.pinyin: Zài gǔdài, rénmen cháng yòng guījiǎ jìnxíng bǔguà.
examples.english: In ancient times, people often used turtle shells for divination.

examples.chinese: 他对未来充满疑虑(他對未來充滿疑慮)，所以决定找人卜卦(所以決定找人卜卦)。
examples.pinyin: Tā duì wèilái chōngmǎn yílǜ, suǒyǐ juédìng zhǎo rén bǔguà.
examples.english: He was full of doubts about the future, so he decided to find someone for divination.

examples.chinese: 在占星术中(在占星術中)，卜法常被用来预测未来(卜法常被用來預測未來)。
examples.pinyin: Zài zhānxīngshù zhōng, bǔfǎ cháng bèi yòng lái yùcè wèilái.
examples.english: In astrology, divination methods are often used to predict the future.
